protocol_notes: Extensive protocol documentation: maintains dedicated mini-fridge with compressor cooling, dual temperature sensors connected to Home Assistant with ESP32/ESPHome setup, Noctua fans for air recirculation, temperature alarms. Maintains detailed Excel log including order dates, delivery dates, batch numbers, CAS numbers, nominal/actual vial contents from third-party lab, endotoxin data, reconstitution dates, bacteriostatic water amounts, calculated dosages in mg/mcg with unit conversions. Triple-checks all dosing calculations before administration. Always swabs stoppers and injection site with alcohol prep pads. Describes dosing math example: calculating bacteriostatic water volume to achieve even-numbered insulin syringe ticks (e.g., 2.5mL water for 60 doses of 500mcg = 4 units per dose). Takes periodic breaks (every 6 months for 1-2 months) to allow body reset and maintain lower effective doses.
